Claim Strategy Session Claim Strategy Claim Strategy

Done for you · Kitchen & bath only

More homeowners calling you in 90 days, or I work for free.

Done For You is everything in one package: your website, your Google, your reviews, and AI search, all built and run for you. I make you the one homeowners find, trust, and call.

Schedule your free strategy session →

Updated July 14, 2026

Homeowners near you are searching right now.

Every day, people near you go to Google looking for a kitchen. Many are ready to spend twenty or thirty thousand dollars. They want to hire someone this week.

These are the customers you want. They are already looking for what you do.

To win them, two things have to go right. First they have to choose you out of the search. Then your website has to turn them into a phone call. I handle both.

First, I make them choose you.

Before they call anyone, they look you up. They check your spot on the map, your reviews, your photos, and how you compare to the business two towns over. More and more, they also ask ChatGPT who’s good nearby.

They decide in a few seconds, from what they see.

So I make sure what they see is you. I set up your Google profile the right way. I add fresh photos every month. I help you get more reviews. I get your name showing up in AI search. When they look at their choices, you are the easy one to call.

Then your website turns lookers into callers.

They click to your site. This is where most sites lose them.

Out of ten homeowners, only one is ready to call today. The other nine are still deciding. Most websites are built only for that one. They show a few photos, a phone number, and a form. They do nothing for the other nine.

Those nine are most of your work for the year.

I build your site for the nine. It shows them the kitchen they’ve been picturing. It answers the questions they’re worried about. It gives them enough proof to stop comparing and call you.

She lands just looking. She leaves ready to call.

If your calls don’t go up in ninety days, we work for free.

Read that again.

Day one, we write down your numbers. How many calls you get, how many homeowners find you. Then I get to work, and you watch it happen every week.

Ninety days in, more homeowners are calling you than the day we started. If they’re not, you stop paying and I keep working until that number moves.

Still flat three months later? We shake hands and you keep all of it. The profile, the reviews, the work. Yours.

Picture the calendar then. The gaps filled. The phone going off while you’re on a job, because they find you first now, not the guy three streets over.

If it doesn’t happen, I haven’t earned a dollar. And I don’t stop until it does.

Here’s exactly what you get.

One package, built and run for you every month.

  • A website built to convert. Your kitchens, your reviews, your services, on a site made to turn a homeowner who is just looking into one who calls. You see it before you pay a dollar.
  • Your Google profile, rebuilt and run. The right categories, every service filled in, fresh photos and posts each month. So you climb the map for people searching near you.
  • Local SEO that moves you up. Your site and profile built around what homeowners actually search, so you rise above the business two towns over.
  • A steady stream of reviews. Every kitchen you finish becomes another five-star review, the first thing they read before they call.
  • Set up for AI search. When they ask ChatGPT or Google’s AI who to call nearby, you’re one of the names it gives them.

Bought piece by piece, here’s what each one really costs:

The piece Hired out With me
Website built to convert$5,000 buildIncluded
Website hosting & upkeep$150/moIncluded
Local SEO, every month$1,500/moIncluded
Google profile, run for you$300/moIncluded
Reviews & reputation$275/moIncluded
AI search optimization$1,000/moIncluded
What you’d pay $3,225/moplus $5,000 build $750/mo

$750 a month. Month to month. You own all of it.

Anyone can promise you more calls. In 30 minutes, I’ll show you exactly how.

We’ll build your plan around the three things a homeowner checks before they pick anyone: your Google, your website, and whether AI names you when they ask. I’ll show you the exact moves to become the one they call, in the right order.

You leave with that plan written down. Run it yourself or hand it to me.

Book your 30-minute strategy session → 30 minutes. Kitchen and bath only.

— Shane Nguyen, Kitchen Websites

P.S. This is for owners doing great work but losing jobs online. If that’s you, it’s the best half hour you’ll spend on your business this month.

The questions a burned owner actually asks.

What is Done For You, exactly?

One package that gets you found by the homeowners already searching, and picked when they look you up.

I rebuild and run your Google profile, build you a website that turns a curious click into a booked estimate, keep new reviews coming in, and set you up so AI names you when they ask for someone nearby.

Built and run for you, every month. You stay on the tools. I handle the screen.

How is this different from the SEO company that took $1,500 and mailed me charts?

They billed you for effort. I’m on the hook for a result.

They swore they owned Google and sold you rankings nobody controls. I promise the one thing I can actually move, more homeowners finding you and calling than do today, and I put a ninety-day deadline on it.

They locked you in for a year. I earn next month, every month. You see the work every week, and you own every piece of it.

Do you buy me leads?

No. I’m not the Angi game, selling you the same homeowner four other businesses already bought.

I get you the homeowners already searching for your work, by pushing your rankings up so they find you and building the site that turns them into phone calls once they do.

What I guarantee is the number that matters: more homeowners finding you and calling than do today. Beat that in ninety days, or you stop paying and I keep going.

What happens if it doesn’t work?

Then you don’t pay, and I don’t stop.

Day one, we write down your numbers. Ninety days in, more homeowners are calling than the day we started, or you stop paying and I keep working until that number moves.

Still flat three months later? We shake hands and you keep all of it. The profile, the reviews, the site. Yours. And I haven’t earned a dollar.

Do I own my website and Google profile?

All of it. Always.

The site, the domain, the Google profile, the photos, the content. It’s yours from day one.

Most agencies hold it hostage so you can’t leave. Cancel any month and it all walks out the door with you.

I’m slammed on jobs. How much of my time does this take?

Almost none. That’s the point.

I need about an hour up front to learn your business and your work. After that, I do the building.

The only thing I ask is that you call back the homeowners who reach out. You’re doing that part anyway.

What do I actually get for $750 a month?

The whole plan. A website built to convert, your Google rebuilt and run every month, local SEO, a steady stream of new five-star reviews, AI search setup, and the ninety-day guarantee behind all of it.

Hired out piece by piece, the same work stacks into thousands a month, an SEO firm alone runs $1,000 to $2,500. You get all of it for $750, month to month, and you own every piece.

Why you instead of a regular marketing agency?

Because most agencies run the same playbook for a dentist, a roofer, and you. You’re a template with the logo swapped.

I only do kitchen and bath. I know why a homeowner picks one over another, what they’re afraid of, and what makes them call. It’s the only thing I work on.

That’s the difference between marketing that could be for anyone and marketing built to win them, specifically.

Book my 30-minute session → Free. Kitchen and bath only. Keep the plan either way.
